---
title: "nitrix.stats.lme.reml"
generated: true
signature-hash: 4b527e8109ea873a
---

::: {.callout-important title="Generated reference stub — fill me"}
Auto-generated scaffold for `nitrix.stats.lme.reml` (signatures only). Replace the
skeletons with authored prose; do **not** ship as-is (SPEC §6.5).
`check_reference_staleness.py` flags this page if the underlying
signatures drift from this stub.
:::

## `REMLResult` {#REMLResult}

*decorated:* `@register_result(children=('theta_hat', 'beta_hat', 'log_lik', 'fixed_cov', 'theta_cov', 'grad_m'))`, `@dataclass(frozen=True)`

```python
class REMLResult
```

Per-voxel REML fit output.

*TODO: class overview.*


### Methods

```python
sigma_b_sq(self) -> Float[Array, 'V']
```

```python
sigma_e_sq(self) -> Float[Array, 'V']
```

```python
cov_re(self) -> Float[Array, 'V 1 1']
```

Random-effect covariance as the uniform ``(V, k, k)`` block (D2): the

```python
re_labels(self) -> Tuple[str, ...]
```

Names of the ``k`` random-effect dimensions of :attr:`cov_re`.

## `LMEResult` {#LMEResult}

*decorated:* `@register_result(children=('beta_hat', 'cov_re', 'sigma_e_sq', 'log_lik', 'fixed_cov', 'theta_cov', 'grad_m'), aux=('tier',))`, `@dataclass(frozen=True)`

```python
class LMEResult
```

Block-Woodbury (R2) mixed-model fit output -- one correlated / diagonal

*TODO: class overview.*


### Methods

```python
re_labels(self) -> Tuple[str, ...]
```

Names of the ``r`` within-factor random-effect dimensions of

## `NestedLMEResult` {#NestedLMEResult}

*decorated:* `@register_result(children=('beta_hat', 'var_outer', 'var_inner', 'sigma_e_sq', 'log_lik'), aux=('tier',))`, `@dataclass(frozen=True)`

```python
class NestedLMEResult
```

Nested two-level mixed-model fit output (the ``lme_fit`` R3 path).

*TODO: class overview.*


### Methods

```python
cov_re(self) -> Float[Array, 'V 2 2']
```

Random-effect covariance as the uniform ``(V, k, k)`` block (D2): the

```python
re_labels(self) -> Tuple[str, ...]
```

Names of the ``k`` random-effect dimensions of :attr:`cov_re`.

## `CrossedLMEResult` {#CrossedLMEResult}

*decorated:* `@register_result(children=('beta_hat', 'var_group', 'var_cross', 'sigma_e_sq', 'log_lik'), aux=('tier',))`, `@dataclass(frozen=True)`

```python
class CrossedLMEResult
```

Crossed two-factor mixed-model fit output (the ``lme_fit`` R4 path).

*TODO: class overview.*


### Methods

```python
cov_re(self) -> Float[Array, 'V 2 2']
```

Random-effect covariance as the uniform ``(V, k, k)`` block (D2): the

```python
re_labels(self) -> Tuple[str, ...]
```

Names of the ``k`` random-effect dimensions of :attr:`cov_re`.

## `LMEContrast` {#LMEContrast}

```python
class LMEContrast
```

Per-voxel mixed-model t-contrast result.

*TODO: class overview.*

## `LMEFContrast` {#LMEFContrast}

```python
class LMEFContrast
```

Per-voxel mixed-model F-contrast result.

*TODO: class overview.*

## `reml_fit` {#reml_fit}

```python
reml_fit(Y: Float[Array, 'V N'], X: Float[Array, 'N p'], Z: Float[Array, 'N q'], *, theta_init: Optional[Float[Array, 'V 2']]=None, n_iter: int=20, damping: float=1e-06, block: Optional[int]=None, low_rank: Optional[bool]=None) -> REMLResult
```

Voxelwise variance-components REML fit.

**Parameters** — *TODO: document each parameter.*

**Returns** — *TODO.*

## `lme_fit` {#lme_fit}

```python
lme_fit(Y: Float[Array, 'V N'], X: Float[Array, 'N p'], *, group: Int[Array, 'N'], z: Optional[Float[Array, 'N r']]=None, inner: Optional[Int[Array, 'N']]=None, cross: Optional[Int[Array, 'N']]=None, corr: Optional[Union[str, CorrSpec]]=None, time: Optional[Float[Array, 'N']]=None, structure: Structure='unstructured', n_iter: int=20, damping: float=1e-06, block: Optional[int]=None, low_rank: Optional[bool]=None) -> Union[REMLResult, LMEResult, NestedLMEResult, CorrLMEResult, CrossedLMEResult]
```

Voxelwise mixed model, dispatched to the cheapest exact solver.

**Parameters** — *TODO: document each parameter.*

**Returns** — *TODO.*

## `lme_t_contrast` {#lme_t_contrast}

```python
lme_t_contrast(result: 'Union[REMLResult, LMEResult]', contrast: Float[Array, 'p'], *, dof: ContrastDof='satterthwaite', X: Optional[Float[Array, 'N p']]=None, Z: Optional[Float[Array, 'N q']]=None) -> LMEContrast
```

Per-voxel t-test of a mixed-model fixed-effect contrast ``c^T beta = 0``.

**Parameters** — *TODO: document each parameter.*

**Returns** — *TODO.*

## `lme_f_contrast` {#lme_f_contrast}

```python
lme_f_contrast(result: 'Union[REMLResult, LMEResult]', contrast: Float[Array, 'L p'], *, dof: ContrastDof='satterthwaite', X: Optional[Float[Array, 'N p']]=None, Z: Optional[Float[Array, 'N q']]=None) -> LMEFContrast
```

Per-voxel F-test of a multi-row mixed-model contrast ``C beta = 0``.

**Parameters** — *TODO: document each parameter.*

**Returns** — *TODO.*
